title: Verify entry point behavior changes based on trial day
description: Test that the entry point for the Trial Corner correctly switches from a widget to a floating pill after Day 1 of the trial.

steps.description: 1. On Day 0 or Day 1 of the trial, load the homepage.
3. Simulate the user being on Day 2 of the trial.

expected_result: On Day 0/1, the widget is displayed. On Day 2, the widget is replaced by a floating pill entry point as per the user flow specification.
